name: X (Twitter) Browser Automation Playbook
description: Use this skill for interactive work on X.com — posting, searching/collecting, opening bookmarks/notifications/profile/Grok, liking/bookmarking focused posts, replying, Grok-via-X OAuth flows, audio/video transcription from X media, and other live browser actions. Prefer the verified X composite tools first when they fit. For plain X status URLs that the user wants fetched/read, start with web_fetch for one URL or web_fetch_batch for several URLs and answer from that unless more interaction is requested.
bestFor: X.com interactive workflows, X media download and transcription, X posting and engagement, X content collection and analysis
